Who We Are

Fresh juice.
No shortcuts.

We're a fresh juice stall born in Islamabad — no syrups, no concentrates, no compromises. Real fruit, cold-squeezed, handed to you in seconds.

Every single cup is made fresh, just for you. That's not a tagline — it's the only way we know how to do it.

"Made fresh, Just for you"

Our Story

Started with
one idea.

Islamabad deserved better than packaged juice and artificial flavours. So we built a stall, learned the craft, and decided to do one thing — fresh juice — and do it better than anyone else in the city.

No fancy machines. No factory. Just real fruit, real people, real care. Every morning we source fresh, every cup we make to order. That's the squeeze'd way.

"Made fresh,
Just for you."
What We Squeeze

The Menu

Two sizes · Made fresh to order · G-13, Islamabad

Mango Bliss

Pure Pakistani desi mango — golden, thick, and impossibly sweet. The one that keeps you coming back.

Rs. 200Rs. 250
Bestseller

Choco Bliss

Rich chocolate blended smooth with a cold base. Dessert in a cup — indulgent, bold, and dangerously good.

Rs. 300Rs. 350
Premium

Purple Paradise

Real falsa juice — deep, tart, and rich in colour. A Pakistani summer classic done the squeeze'd way.

Rs. 150Rs. 200
Fan Fav

Peachy Paradise

Fresh peach blended silky smooth. Soft, floral, and perfectly balanced — sunshine in every sip.

Rs. 200Rs. 250
Seasonal

Freeze'd Slush

Our signature icy slush — crushed, frozen, intensely flavoured mango and lemon. Pure cold magic.

Rs. 150Rs. 200
Signature

Frosty Blue

Blueberry slush with a frosty blue hue that looks as good as it tastes. Cold, bold, and totally unique.

Rs. 150Rs. 200
Eye-Catcher

Sunset Dreams

A gradient mocktail of tropical flavours with fresh mint. Looks like a sunset, tastes like a dream.

Rs. 400
Mocktail

Berry Blue

A deep blueberry mocktail, bold and jewel-toned. As powerful in flavour as it looks in the cup.

Rs. 400
Mocktail

Loyalty Program

Drink more,
earn more.

Every juice earns you a stamp. Fill your card and your next drink is completely on us. No app. No points system. Just a card and a habit worth keeping.
